mapper.update:
update file_storage_db.file_share
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
file_id = #{fileId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
share_code = #{shareCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
extraction_code = #{extractionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
view_count = #{viewCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
download_count = #{downloadCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
expire_time = #{expireTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

on duplicate key update user_id=values(user_id), file_id=values(file_id), share_code=values(share_code), extraction_code=values(extraction_code), view_count=values(view_count), download_count=values(download_count), expire_time=values(expire_time), `status`=values(`status`), create_time=values(create_time)
